name: text-input
title: TextInput
description: A styled native `<input>` for single-line text entry. Use for any short string field ‚Äî names, emails, search queries, numeric values, passwords. The wrapper re-exports `Input`.

meta.docs:
# TextInput A styled native `` for single-line text entry. Use for any short string field ‚Äî names, emails, search queries, numeric values, passwords. The wrapper re-exports `Input`. ## When to use - **Short single-line text** ‚Äî ``. Every native attribute (`type`, `autoComplete`, `inputMode`, `pattern`, `min`, `max`) just works. - **Typed inputs** ‚Äî `` selects the native UA behaviour. No separate `NumberInput`/`SearchInput` components ‚Äî use `type` + composition. - **Password field** ‚Äî ``. For a show/hide toggle, compose with a ghost icon `Button` and local `useState`. - **Invalid state** ‚Äî `aria-invalid` triggers the destructive border + ring out of the box; render error text as a sibling `

`. - **Read-only** ‚Äî native `readOnly`; add `className="bg-muted cursor-not-allowed"` to mimic Carbon's greyed look. - **Icon prefix / suffix** ‚Äî wrap with `InputGroup` to attach icons or trailing actions. ## When not to use - **Multi-line text** ‚Äî use `Textarea` (shadcn `TextArea`). - **Choice from a fixed list** ‚Äî use `Select` or `ComboBox`. - **Boolean toggles** ‚Äî use `Switch` or `Checkbox`. ## Composition - Ships **just the input** ‚Äî no label, helper text, or error message. Pair with `

` elements (or shadcn `Field`) for the full field experience. - Built-in `aria-invalid:` selectors apply destructive styling automatically ‚Äî no need for a separate `invalid` prop. - Default sizing is `h-9 text-base md:text-sm`; override with `className="h-10"` to match Carbon's `md` density. - Form libraries (React Hook Form, TanStack Form) work out of the box ‚Äî the underlying element is a real ``.
meta.migrationGuide: # TextInput ‚Äî Carbon ‚Üí shadcn migration guide ## Naming - Carbon: `TextInput` (PascalCase, two words). - shadcn: `Input` (PascalCase, one word). Same behaviour at the core (a styled ``); different name and very different surface area. ## Structural differences Carbon's `TextInput` is a **monolithic field**: input, label, helper text, error text, and warning text all live inside one component, configured by props (`labelText`, `helperText`, `invalidText`, `warnText`). shadcn's `Input` is **just a styled ``** ‚Äî exactly that, nothing else. Labels, helper text, and error text are external composition (typically with the shadcn `Field` primitive, or by hand). | Concept | Carbon | shadcn | |---|---|---| | Wrapper / element | `` (compound) | `` (raw ``) | | Label | `labelText` prop | external `
